title: CobbleLagClear
description: Cobblemon Lag Clear is a performance-focused mod built to prevent TPS drops and keep your Cobblemon Minecraft server running smooth. It targets the biggest lag sources on busy servers: excess Pokémon entities, ground items, vanilla mob spawning, and farm
body:
![Lag clear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28752c3958b42aa2d956bdef499baf5d26610f2a.jpeg)
Cobblemon Lag Clear is a performance-focused mod built to prevent TPS drops and keep your Cobblemon Minecraft server running smooth. It targets the biggest lag sources on busy servers: excess Pokémon entities, ground items, and farm growth tick load (optinal). Everything is configurable.

✅ Key Features

1) Automatic Pokémon Cleanup (safe rules — It does not delete Pokémon from players or Pokémon in battle.)

2) Dropped item removal

3)  *OPTIONAL* Blocks crop/plant growth to prevent farm lag

On a configurable timer (default: every 20 minutes), the mod runs a server-wide Pokémon cleanup to reduce entity load and stabilize TPS.

The cleanup automatically keeps:

Shinies

Legendaries

Pokémon spawned in the last 2 minutes (OPTIONAL)

Pokémon belonging to players (player Pokémon are never removed)

Pokémon tied to NPCs (NPC spawns are avoided)

📢 Before cleanup happens, the mod sends clear warnings in chat:

10 minutes - 5 minutes - 3 minutes - 1 minute

And it announces when cleanup completes.

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/427823bfaeb073c876fae2fa04a75e13b29ec40f_0.webp)

Join our Discord server to receive support and new versions faster!

[https://discord.gg/ZbGDMuZtec](https://discord.gg/ZbGDMuZtec)


Important: Every time Pokémon are removed, ground items are also cleared (and players are warned about this in the messages). This significantly reduces lag caused by item piles, AFK grinders, and drop-heavy areas.

2) ****OPTINAL**** Blocks crop/plant growth to prevent farm lag

Large farms can generate heavy tick load and block updates. This mod can block all crop/plant growth, preventing laggy farm setups from dragging down TPS.

⚙️ Fully configurable + professional chat messages

Default cleanup interval: 20 minutes (configurable)

All plugin messages are colored, clean, and professional

Every message is editable in the config, so you can match your server’s style and language

🧹 Manual cleanup command

Alongside automation, the mod includes a manual command to trigger Pokémon + item cleanup on demand—perfect for peak hours, events, or quick maintenance.

🎯 Perfect for Cobblemon servers that want:

higher and more stable TPS

less entity lag

fewer Pokémon and drops cluttering loaded chunks

farms that don’t destroy server performance (optional)

clear, polished chat warnings for players
